children.text: Source: project processed outputs; synthetic claim layer for demonstration.

The product prices return-shipping loss,
not generic refund behavior.
Covered loss = compliant buyer return shipping cost.
A return event is not automatically an insurance claim. The claim layer only pays covered return-shipping cost.
